title: Ice Cube Moulds | 4 Pcs Large Ice Ball Maker with Leak Proof Lid | Food Grade Silicone Round Ice Cube Moulds Easy to Pop Out | Sphere Ice Cube Mould Perfect for Freezer Whiskey, Gin, Cocktails
features: ✔️【SAFE FOOD GRADE MATERIAL】The large ice cube moulds ball is made of food-grade silicone, certified by US FDA standards, and free of harmful chemicals such as BPA. It is absolutely safe to make ice cube, and without the smell of traditional plastic ice trays! In addition, our whiskey ice ball maker are solid and durable, can withstand temperatures from -40 °C to 230 °C, safe for use in the dishwasher, freezer, oven, refrigerator and microwave.

🍚【2.3 INCHES sphere ICE CUBES】Our round ice cube moulds can make 4 ice balls at a time. Large ice cube with a diameter of 6cm could melt slower to prevent diluting drinks to keep the original taste! Perfect for whiskey, scotch, bourbon, cocktails and much more, giving you longer periods of coolness and pleasure. In addition, these extra large ice balls will add style to any dinner or cocktail party!

💪【EASY TO FILL AND POP OUT】The flexible silicone material shapes the ice ball mould bottom well, which makes it quick and easy to release ice cubes, non-stick surface. You no longer need to bend or twist awkwardly with force! Just press down from the bottom to place in a pitcher or drinking cup! Each silicone ice cube moulds with a built tiny funnel on the lid allows direct inject water into the mold without any tools.

🥂【TIGHT-FITTING AND LEAKPROOF】Our sphere ice cube mould are compact and feature an anti-tip bottom for easy movement without tipping over, keeping your fridge neat and tidy! In addition, each round ice cube tray comes with a removable and leakproof lid, which keeps the ice cube stack easily and neatly without sticking, preventing ice cubes from absorbing freezer odors and saving more space. The size is ideal for smaller freezers with limited space.

🧊【MULTIFUNCTIONAL DIY PRODUCTS】 You can add any flavor you like to the round ice cube maker, such as lemon, strawberry, mint, tea to make creative ice balls. It is also ideal for making all kinds of DIY foods such as ice cream, pudding, jelly and frozen fruit, juice, coffee, baby food. Make your own special round ice cubes with the family now and enjoy cooling moments at family dinners, bars, outdoor parties!

✨ 【100% SATISFACTION GUARANTEE】We have confidence in our novelty large ice cube moulds. And we devote ourselves to providing the best customer service and bringing the best shopping experience to every customer. If it doesn't meet your expectations, please contact us, we are willing to provide a better solution for every customer! All your questions will be replied to within 24hrs!
description: Product Description BOCHION FAMILY TESTIMONIALS！ A good set of ice cube tray set, enough to carry the happy of home. No matter how times change! BOCHION Home, always the chater of our lives, love and responsiblity are the bonds of family. Our each ice cube trays plot exudes charm, transmitting a state of life creates a exquisite life. Now you need to make a choice！ MAKE YOUR SUMMER MORE INTERESTING! Perfect Round Ice Balls On a sweltering summer day, there's nothing quite like an icy-cold drink to quench your thirst. Whether you run a busy bar, or are holding a party at home. BOCHION large ice cube ball take much longer to melt, so you can enjoy the original taste of cold drinks without diluting. No need to hurry and down your drink. Take your time and enjoy the richness of flavor sip by sip. Food Grade Silicone BPA free. The Built-in Funnel is Easy to Fill. Release and Pop Out Ice Cube with Ease. Safe for Dishwashers and Microwaves. No Unpleasant Smell. HIGH-QUALITY MATERIALS The taste and smell of your beverage may be affected by plastic or silicone of poor quality. But we tackle this problem by using silicone of the premium food grade, which makes our ice balls smell- and taste-free. Ice cube tray with lid and unique seal design, no worry of leaking or splashing all around the kitchen. EASY TO FILL The silicone ice cube moulds have a special funnel, just put them under the tap to fill. (We recommend you not to fill it too full.) Make sure to tightly seal the ice ball maker and place in the least cold part of the freezer for 6-8 hours. EASY RELEASE The flexible silicone material shapes the bottom well, which makes it quick and easy to release ice cubes. To release the ice ball, you just squeeze the bottom. After taking out from the freezer, it is recommended to let it stand for 1-2 minutes to release. STACKABLE We know your freezer space is precious. So the ice ball mould is easily tucked into a corner of the freezer without taking up too much bulky space. And the ice ball mould featured an anti-tip and leak-proof design, keeping it in the freezer prevents tipping and spilling. Bring A More Flavorful Drink Experience For You. These round ice cube moulds could create 4 large ice cubes. Great for whiskey, cocktails, making popsicles, icing your Coffee, and infusing fruit or herbs. KEEP DRINKS ICE COOL FOR LONGER A unique beautiful serve with the benefits of maximum chill with minimum dilution. Elevate your Old Fashioned, cocktails, and on-the-rock whiskey drinks with the classy and sophisticated look of a clear ice sphere. Impress onlookers and get compliments from guests when you pop out the ice of this round ball ice maker. SURPRISE GIFT SET This ice cube tray is a wonderful gift idea for any occasion. Great as a holiday, Housewarming, Christmas, Thanksgiving, Birthday, Bridal Shower, Wedding Registry, Graduation, Anniversaries, Holiday, Camping, Wedding & Mother's Day present!
